data.title: Tevogen CEO highlights growth, capital, and AI expansion in letter to stockholders. Stock ticker: TVGN.
data.description: A press release dated August 1, 2025, from Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. based in Warren, N.J., was issued via Globe Newswire. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TVGN, shared a letter addressed to its stockholders.

data.title: AmeriCorps funding cuts jeopardize National Mental Health Corps pipeline, impacting crisis call center placements.
data.description: In Newtown, Connecticut on August 1, 2025, the National Mental Health Corps (NMHC) faces uncertainty with potential repercussions for the mental health workforce. As a primary source for mental health professionals, NMHC is at risk due to the discontinuation of AmeriCorps funding for crisis call center placements. This loss comes at a critical time amidst a rising mental health crisis, with approximately X crisis calls being handled per month. The future of X individuals relying on mental health services through NMHC hangs in the balance, emphasizing the urgent need for funding support in this sector.

data.title: Bitcoin whale from 2009 moves millions of BTC. Analysts warn of potential correction due to long-term holders selling.
data.description: According to analysts at CryptoQuant, the selling pressure from long-term holders has the potential to trigger a significant correction lasting for several months.

data.title: HK Monetary Authority plans to reopen 10-year RMB bonds in August 2025, offering RMB1.5 billion to primary dealers in a tender.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has announced a tender for the re-opening of 10-year RMB HKSAR Institutional Government Bonds. They are offering RMB1.5 billion to primary dealers to participate in this tender. This initiative aims to further strengthen the financial market in Hong Kong and promote investment opportunities in the region.

data.title: OpenAI secures $8.3 billion, now valued at $300 billion; funding round oversubscribed 5x amid high AI investor interest.
data.description: The recent funding round for OpenAI was in high demand among investors, being five times oversubscribed. This surge in interest reflects the growing enthusiasm for AI technology. The company's valuation now stands at $300 billion, a significant milestone in the industry.

data.title: Pho Hoa Cypress opens in Cypress, California on Aug 2 & 3, 2025, featuring a diverse pho menu.
data.description: A new Pho Hoa restaurant has recently opened in Cypress, California on August 1, 2025. Offering a fresh and unique pho menu, this location aims to cater to both loyal pho enthusiasts and newcomers to the cuisine. The grand opening comes after the success of previous launches, showcasing the company's commitment to expanding its presence.

data.title: Tevogen Bio to receive $1 million grant for AI expansion in drug discovery.
data.description: Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc., based in Warren, New Jersey, disclosed on August 1, 2025, its anticipation of obtaining $1 million in grant funding for the progression of Tevogen.AI. The company, traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TVGN, focuses on leveraging artificial intelligence in its drug discovery and development endeavors.
